creator: muir@try.idiom.com
text:
1 3C5x9 board(s) on ISA found at 0x300
	ep0: 3c5x9 at 0x300 in test mode. Erase pencil mark!
	ep0: eeprom failed to come ready.

	What does it mean?  Help!  

	The semantic content I get out of "Erase pencil mark" is:
	USE THE SOURCE, LUKE.   I will, but it would be nice if the
	probe failed with message that gave even the smallest 
	clue what was wrong.

	(Anyone have any clues they want to pass along?)

How-To-Repeat: 
	Aquire and assemble the following hardware:

		Motherboard     Intel Premier/PCI II 
		CPU             Intel Pentium 90
		32MB RAM
		PCI SCSI        ?? NCR53c810
		DISK            SEGATE ST32550N (2GB low power barracuda)
		ETHERNET        3COM Etherlink III 3c509B-TP
		VIDEO           ATI Ultra Pro 

	Try to install NetBSD 1.0 or FreeBSD 2.0.   

	The probe message above comes from FreeBSD 2.0, but NetBSD 1.0,
	produced almost identical messages.
